articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: Apple reportedly testing four designs for upcoming smart glasses - TechCrunch
articles.description: These glasses are a step back from an ambitious plan that once called for Apple to launch a variety of mixed and augmented reality devices.
articles.content:
Apple plans to sell its first smart glasses in 2027, with a possible unveiling at the end of this year, according to Bloombergs Mark Gurman.
Gurman has been reporting steadily on the evolution of th… [+993 chars]
